hard_reset_desc: The local save will be deleted. This action is irreversible.
city_panel_no_selection: No city selected. Click on a city on the map.
building_market_desc: Allows trading and regularly generates gold (cooldown reduced by 10% per level).
building_market_desc_maxlvl4:
Allows trading and regularly generates gold (cooldown reduced by 10% per level).
Lvl.4: with the Specialized Market research, reduces trade rate for one resource to 4:1; with the Automatic Market research, automatically sells this city's resource overflow.
building_seaport_desc: Allows manual and automatic food harvest from water, and also generates random resources.
building_seaport_desc_0:
Allows manual food harvest from water.
At level 2, unlocks automatic harvest.
From level 3, allows random resource generation.
building_seaport_desc_1:
Allows manual food harvest from water.
At level 2, unlocks automatic harvest.
From level 3, allows random resource generation.
building_seaport_desc_2:
Allows manual and automatic food harvest from water.
From level 3, allows random resource generation.
building_warehouse_desc: Increases storage capacity for basic and advanced resources.
building_forge_desc: Enhances production buildings. +10% chance to double automatic harvests per level.
building_library_desc: Automatically produces research points, allowing you to unlock technologies.
building_townhall_desc: Allows manual harvest of basic resources. Provides storage space. All buildings are unlocked.
building_townhall_desc_0:
Allows manual harvest of basic resources. Provides storage space.
► Lvl.2 unlocks: Forge, Library, Temple
► Lvl.3 unlocks: Mine
► Lvl.4 (Capital) unlocks: Guilds, Imperial Port
building_townhall_desc_1:
Allows manual harvest of basic resources. Provides storage space.
► Lvl.2 unlocks: Forge, Library, Temple
► Lvl.3 unlocks: Mine
► Lvl.4 (Capital) unlocks: Guilds, Imperial Port
building_townhall_desc_2:
Allows manual harvest of basic resources. Provides storage space.
► Lvl.3 unlocks: Mine
► Lvl.4 (Capital) unlocks: Guilds, Imperial Port
building_townhall_desc_3:
Allows manual harvest of basic resources. Provides storage space.
► Lvl.4 (Capital) unlocks: Guilds, Imperial Port
building_buildersguild_desc: Auto-builds a road (distance ≤ 3) every 5s (4 Wood/Brick reduction) and outposts every 10s. Halves the new-city founding surcharge based on cities already built (surface & underworld). Automation surface only. See Automation tab.
building_buildersguild_desc_0:
Automates road construction and halves the new-city founding surcharge based on cities already built (surface & underworld), from level 1 onward. Available at Capital level (4).
► Lvl.1: distance ≤ 1 (1 Wood/Brick reduction)
► Lvl.2: distance ≤ 2 (reduction 2)
► Lvl.3: distance ≤ 3 (reduction 4)
► Lvl.4 also unlocks: automatic outposts
building_buildersguild_desc_1:
Auto-builds a road (distance ≤ 1) every 5s. Reduces road cost by 1 Wood/Brick. Halves the new-city founding surcharge based on cities already built (surface & underworld). Automation surface only.
► Lvl.2: distance ≤ 2 (reduction 2)
► Lvl.3: distance ≤ 3 (reduction 4)
► Lvl.4 also unlocks: automatic outposts
building_buildersguild_desc_2:
Auto-builds a road (distance ≤ 2) every 5s. Reduces road cost by 2 Wood/Brick. Halves the new-city founding surcharge based on cities already built (surface & underworld). Automation surface only.
► Lvl.3: distance ≤ 3 (reduction 4)
► Lvl.4 also unlocks: automatic outposts
building_buildersguild_desc_3:
Auto-builds a road (distance ≤ 3) every 5s. Reduces road cost by 4 Wood/Brick. Halves the new-city founding surcharge based on cities already built (surface & underworld). Automation surface only.
► Lvl.4 also unlocks: automatic outposts
building_buildersguild_desc_4: Auto-builds a road (distance ≤ 3) every 5s (4 Wood/Brick reduction) and also outposts every 10s (pays cost). Halves the new-city founding surcharge based on cities already built (surface & underworld). Automation surface only. See Automation tab.
automation_road_note: Roads built this way are free.
automation_outpost_note: Chosen position may not be optimal.
automation_production_note: The order in which buildings are upgraded is random.
automation_artisan_note: The order in which buildings are upgraded is random.
automation_library_note: The order in which buildings are upgraded is random.
automation_market_note: The order in which buildings are upgraded is random.
automation_seaport_locked: Requires the Imperial Port prestige vertex + an Imperial Port
automation_military_buildings_desc: Automatically builds/upgrades Barracks, Military Academies, Arsenals, Weapon Smiths and Armor Smiths
automation_military_buildings_note: The order in which buildings are upgraded is random.
automation_military_reinforcement_desc: Transfers soldiers from full cities to nearby less-defended ones
automation_military_reinforcement_note: Won't pull soldiers from cities near enemies.
automation_military_patrol_desc: Automatically raids monsters that approach a city
automation_military_patrol_note: Costs no gold, unlike a manual Raid.
automation_military_vendetta_desc: Automatically raids the civilization that last attacked you or that you last raided
automation_military_vendetta_note: Only one civilization targeted at a time; the target updates automatically.
building_harvestersguild_desc: Unique building. Unlocks level 5 for production buildings and automates their construction. Available at Capital level (4).
building_harvestersguild_desc_0:
Unique building. Unlocks level 5 for production buildings and automates their construction. Available at Capital level (4).
► Lvl.1: auto-upgrade every 10s
► Lvl.2: every 7.5s
► Lvl.3: every 5s
► Lvl.4: every 2.5s (maximum speed)
building_harvestersguild_desc_1:
Unlocks level 5 (Sawmill, Brickworks, Quarry, Mill). Auto-upgrades production buildings every 10s.
► Lvl.2: every 7.5s
► Lvl.3: every 5s
► Lvl.4: every 2.5s (maximum speed)
building_harvestersguild_desc_2:
Auto-upgrades production buildings every 7.5s.
► Lvl.3: every 5s
► Lvl.4: every 2.5s (maximum speed)
building_harvestersguild_desc_3:
Auto-upgrades production buildings every 5s.
► Lvl.4: every 2.5s (maximum speed)
building_harvestersguild_desc_4: Auto-upgrades production buildings every 2.5s. Maximum speed.
tooltip_requires_3_production_level4: ⚠ Requires 3 production buildings (Sawmill, Brickworks, Quarry or Mill) at level 4 in this city
tooltip_requires_forge_level4: ⚠ Requires a level 4 Forge in this city
tooltip_requires_military_academy: ⚠ Requires a Military Academy in this city
tooltip_requires_fairy_circle: ⚠ Must be built next to a discovered Fairy Circle
tooltip_requires_volcano: ⚠ Must be built next to a discovered volcano
tooltip_requires_adjacent_city: ⚠ Requires a city next to the Monument to invest
building_militaryacademy_desc: Increases soldier capacity by +5 per level and soldier production speed by +25% per level.
building_traderguild_desc: Unique building. Increases Markets' max level by 2 and automates their construction/upgrade. Requires a Market and a level 4 Seaport.
building_traderguild_desc_1: Increases Markets' max level by 2. Auto-builds/upgrades Markets every 10s.
building_artisansguild_desc: Unique building. Unlocks level 5 for the Forge and automates construction of Forges and Warehouses. Available at Capital level (4).
building_artisansguild_desc_1: Unlocks level 5 for the Forge. Auto-builds/upgrades Forges and Warehouses every 10s.
building_academy_desc: Unique building. Automates scientific building construction, increases research point production speed by 10% per level, doubles research investment speed (+100%), and improves the research cancel refund rate by 12.5% per level.
building_academy_desc_1: Auto-builds/upgrades Libraries and Laboratories every 10s. Research speed +25%. Cancel refund +12.5%.
building_academy_desc_2: Auto-builds/upgrades Libraries and Laboratories every 10s. Research speed +50%. Cancel refund +25%.
building_academy_desc_3: Auto-builds/upgrades Libraries and Laboratories every 10s. Research speed +75%. Cancel refund +37.5%.
building_academy_desc_4: Auto-builds/upgrades Libraries and Laboratories every 10s. Research speed +100%. Cancel refund +50% (no loss on cancel).
building_academy_desc_5: Auto-builds/upgrades Libraries and Laboratories every 10s. Research speed +125%. Cancel refund +50% (no loss on cancel).
tooltip_requires_library_level4: ⚠ Requires a level 4 Library in this city
building_watchtower_desc: Reveals hexes within a radius of 2 around the city.
building_imperialport_desc: Unique imperial building. Required to trigger Prestige. Unlocks a new run for your civilization.
tooltip_imperial_port_prerequisites: Requires a Town Hall lv.4 + Seaport lv.4
building_glassworks_desc: Automatically harvests glass from deserts. Requires Town Hall lvl. 2.
building_laboratory_desc: Automatically produces research points, consuming Gold.
building_palisade_desc: Protects the city against bandit resource theft. Higher levels increase defense and regeneration speed.
building_barracks_desc_0: Allows troop training. Produces 1 soldier every 30s. Soldiers attack adjacent bandits.
building_barracks_desc_1: Produces 1 soldier every 30s. Soldiers attack adjacent bandits.
building_barracks_desc_2: Produces 1 soldier every 30s. Soldiers attack adjacent bandits.
tooltip_prestige_next_island: Accumulated points can be spent on the next island
prestige_tooltip_dragon_bonus: +5 base points per dragon defeated this run
prestige_tooltip_treasure_trove_bonus: +1 prestige point per treasure trove claimed this run
prestige_tooltip_prestige_gain_bonus: Final multiplier on prestige points earned
prestige_tooltip_seaport_bonus: Each Seaport at level 4 grants +5% prestige.
prestige_tooltip_great_lighthouse_bonus: Each Great Lighthouse level grants +10% prestige.
prestige_tooltip_great_lighthouse_second: Level 2 reached: unlocks Maritime Beacon construction.
Level 3 reached: unlocks choosing the next island's Tier.
tooltip_prestige_next_island_tier_picker: Great Lighthouse level 3: choose the Tier of the next island (cannot go below the Tier your civilization has reached).
prestige_tooltip_civilizations_destroyed: Each enemy civilization fully wiped out this run grants +20% prestige.
prestige_tooltip_tier_bonus: The further your civilization advances through tiers, the more formidable the rival civilizations it faces become.
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_seaport_automat: Automates Seaport construction (via Imperial Port building)
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_auto_market_tra: Automatically sells surplus resources in cities with a level 4+ Market
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_auto_buy_trade: Automatically buys the scarcest basic resource with surplus gold in cities with a level 4+ Market
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_market_speciali: All basic resources sell at a 4:1 rate
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_intermediate_tr: Unlocks ore, glass and steel trade at the market (1/5 of the purchase price)
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_contested_harve: Unlocks harvesting on Contested Territories (half speed)
prestige_tooltip_monster_bonus: ×1.2 multiplier when no monsters remain on the surface
prestige_tooltip_wonder_bonus: Multiplier: Wonder level × (1 + hours played, rounded up)
tooltip_requires_seaport_4: ⚠ Requires a level 4 Seaport in this city
tooltip_requires_market: ⚠ Requires a Market in this city
tooltip_unique_city_limit: ⚠ This city already has a unique building
timecontrol_bank_tooltip:
Offline time bank
Time accumulated while offline or paused
Used for speeding up game.
timecontrol_fast_tooltip:
Fast speed (×{0})
Right-click to change speed
maritime_beacon_construction:
Maritime Beacon Construction
Double-click to build
war_fleet_construction:
War Fleet Construction
Double-click to build
tooltip_requires_imperial_port: ⚠ Requires the Imperial Port, built in one of your cities
mobile_camp_construction:
Mobile Camp Construction
Double-click to build
Destroyed if one of your cities is built nearby
Double-click an existing camp to destroy it
road_enemy_protected:
⚠ Enemy influence zone
Destroy the enemy city to build here
city_tooltip_own_mobile_camp:
Our Mobile Camp
Double-click to destroy
prestige_tooltip_soldier_food_free_per_c: soldiers per city consume no food
prestige_tooltip_city_defense_protects_s: Barbican: once defense exceeds 20 pts, enemy attacks no longer kill soldiers first, they reduce defense instead
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_maritime_routes: Unlocks maritime routes (connections via coastal waters)
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_deepest_mine: Unlocks the Deepest Mine (access to the Underworld)
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_raid: Unlocks the Raid action (coordinated attack on an enemy city)
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_patrol: Unlocks Patrol (automatic raiding of monsters near a city)
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_vendetta: Unlocks Vendetta (automatic raids on a civilization)
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_relocation: Unlocks the Relocation action (moves a city to a nearby new location)
prestige_tooltip_per_dominion_level: per Dominion level on the harvested hex
prestige_tooltip_locked_faith: Your lack of faith is disturbing
prestige_tooltip_underworld_treasure: treasure chance per new Underworld hex
prestige_tooltip_underworld_road_reducti: -1 Stone / -½ Ore on base Underworld road cost
prestige_tooltip_underworld_monster_spaw: interval between Underworld border monster spawns
prestige_tooltip_mine_gold_chance: bonus gold chance when harvesting ore
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_magic: Unlocks Mage Tower, rituals and the magic screen
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_invocations: Unlocks Mage Tower, invocations and the magic screen
prestige_tooltip_magic_feature_fairycirc: Allows finding {0} Fairy Circle(s) on the island
hex_tooltip_treasure_trove: 💰 Treasure — building an outpost here gives 10 Gold
hex_tooltip_fairy_circle: ✨ Fairy Circle — its crystals are harvested by an adjacent Alchemist Hut
tooltip_research_max_points:
Max research points: {2}
({0} base + 10% of the {1} total points invested)
tooltip_research_cancel: Cancel the current research (refunds part of the invested points)
research_cancel_desc: Part of the invested points will be recovered ({0} RP).
tech_rapid_construction_desc: Defensive buildings built or upgraded also increase current defense
tech_orpaillage_desc: 10% chance for mines to produce gold in addition to ore
tech_chroniques_du_guet_desc: Your scouts' feats inspire your people. +15% prestige points earned.
tech_diplomatie_desc: Your envoys negotiate access to contested territories. Harvesting is now allowed there, at half speed (harvest time ×2).
event_bandit_body: This bandit blocks harvest on its hex and may steal your resources.
event_bandit_defeated_body: Your soldiers drove off the bandit. Harvesting resumes normally.
event_treasure_found_body: Build an outpost on this hex to claim it and gain +100 Gold and +1 prestige point.
event_treasure_claimed_body: +100 Gold added to your treasury and +1 prestige point.
event_bandit_hideout_body: This hideout blocks harvest and periodically spawns bandits. Destroy it!
event_bandit_hideout_destroyed_body: Your soldiers razed the bandit hideout.
event_dragon_discovered_body: A dragon has landed on this island. It attacks cities at long range and regenerates HP!
event_dragon_defeated_body: Your soldiers managed to slay the dragon.
event_rats_body: Rats have infested one of your hexes. Harvest is blocked until they are eliminated.
event_rats_defeated_body: Your soldiers drove out the rats. Harvest will resume shortly.
hex_tooltip_troll_info: 👹 Troll — harvest blocked ({0}/{1} HP) — regenerates quickly!
event_troll_body: A troll roams the Underworld. It regenerates fast: strike hard and relentlessly!
event_troll_defeated_body: Your soldiers overcame the troll despite its regeneration.
event_adventurer_body: An Adventurer leaves the Guild to hunt monsters in the Underworld.
event_adventurer_defeated_body: The Adventurer died in battle. Another will soon take their place.
hex_tooltip_ogre_info: 🧌 Ogre — harvest blocked ({0}/{1} HP) — ignores palisades!
event_ogre_body: An ogre prowls the Underworld. Its blows crush palisades and outposts alike!
event_ogre_defeated_body: Your soldiers slew the ogre of the depths.
hex_tooltip_minor_demon_info: 👿 Minor demon — harvest blocked ({0}/{1} HP) — very mobile!
event_minor_demon_discovered_body: A minor demon prowls the edges of the Underworld. As powerful as a dragon, but far faster!
event_minor_demon_defeated_body: Your soldiers defeated the minor demon.
hex_tooltip_volcano_info: 🌋 Volcano — harvest blocked — periodic eruptions (30 damage)
event_volcano_discovered_body: An active volcano threatens nearby cities. It erupts periodically, dealing cascade damage. Keep your settlements at a safe distance!
event_deepest_mine_placed_body: The dig site is open. Invest resources to dig down to the Underworld.
event_deepest_mine_dug_body: The Deepest Mine has broken through. An outpost awaits you in the Underworld.
event_underworld_lost_body: Your last outpost in the Underworld has been destroyed. Re-invest in the Deepest Mine to reopen access.
event_fairy_circle_body: The fairies share their crystals. Build an adjacent Alchemist Hut to harvest them.
event_ritual_collapsed_body: Lacking crystals or Mage Towers, one of your rituals has collapsed.
hex_tooltip_dominion_info: ✨ Dominion (lvl. {0}) — boosts harvest speed on this hex
hex_tooltip_corruption_spire: 🌑 Corruption Spire — invest resources to build it
event_corruption_spire_placed_body: Invest resources to complete the Corruption Spire.
event_corruption_spire_built_body: The Spire now amplifies your prestige points based on the Underworld's corruption level.
hex_tooltip_abyss_gate: 🌌 Abyss Gate — invest resources to open it
event_abyss_gate_eligible_body: Your Corruption Spire sits on a zone corrupted enough to evolve into an Abyss Gate. Go check on it!
event_abyss_gate_placed_body: The Corruption Spire is evolving. Invest resources to complete the Abyss Gate.
event_abyss_gate_built_body: The Gate replaces the Corruption Spire and takes over its prestige bonus.
event_civilization_discovered_body: A new civilization has been spotted in your vicinity.
event_civilization_destroyed_body: A civilization lost its last city and has disappeared.
event_soldier_starved_body: Some soldiers died from lack of food. Increase your food stockpile.
event_raid_missing_barracks_body: One of the cities nearest to the raid target has no Barracks.
event_wonder_discovered_body: A wonder stands on this hex. Harvesting here is impossible.
tech_harvest_tools_desc: +1 max level Sawmill, Mill, Quarry and Brickworks
tech_grand_architecture_desc: +1 max level Market, Library and Barracks
tech_specialized_market_desc: +3 max level Market. All basic resources now sell at a 4:1 rate
tech_efficient_trading_desc: +1 bonus gold per 10 units sold at once
tech_automatic_market_desc: Automatically sells surplus basic resources in cities with a level 4+ Market
tech_advanced_trading_posts_desc: Unlocks selling Ore, Glass and Steel at the market, at 1/5 of their purchase price
tech_renommee_commerciale_desc: Your mercantile prosperity radiates beyond your borders. +20% prestige points earned.
tech_steel_weapons_desc: Unlocks the Weapon Smith (max level 2), which produces Steel Weapons by consuming 2 Steel (1 every 10s, faster per level). Each city attack consumes 1 Weapon to deal 1 extra hit.
tech_siderurgie_desc: The Smelter only consumes 3 Ore per smelt.
tech_volcanologie_desc: Studying volcanic soil reveals richer Ore veins: +15% chance to double the automatic harvest of Mines.
tech_volcanic_metallurgy_desc: Unlocks the Volcanic Forge (unique building, max level 3), which harnesses the heat of a nearby volcano to passively generate Glass and boost the civilization's Ore, Steel and Mithril production. Must be built next to a discovered volcano.
tech_steel_armor_desc: Unlocks the Armor Smith (max level 2), which produces Steel Armor by consuming 3 Steel (1 every 10s, faster per level). When a soldier would die, consumes 1 Armor with a 50% chance to save them.
tech_tempered_steel_desc: The Smelter produces +1 Steel per smelt.
tech_remparts_de_fer_desc: Reinforces the Palisade with ore (+1 max level).
tech_remparts_de_mithril_desc: Reinforces the Palisade with mithril (+1 max level).
tech_rail_logistics_desc: Reinforcements are sent twice as fast and their range increases by 1.
tech_mobile_camp_construction_desc: Unlocks construction of the Mobile Camp, a military outpost. It must be at distance ≥ 2 from your other military locations. It is automatically destroyed if one of your cities is built at distance ≤ 1 (no effect on enemy cities).
tech_speleologie_desc: +25% Mine speed and +10 advanced resource storage.
tech_culture_fongique_desc: +25% Mushroom Farm speed and 25% chance to double their harvest.
tech_sagesse_souterraine_desc: Knowledge drawn from the depths enriches your civilization. +25% prestige points earned.
tech_cartographie_souterraine_desc: +5% chance to discover a treasure on each new Underworld hex.
tech_veille_souterraine_desc: Discreet sentinels watch the tunnels and deter incursions: +75% interval between border monster spawn attempts in the Underworld.
tech_etude_des_abysses_desc: Your scholars dare to study what seeps from the Rift. +5% treasure chance per new Underworld hex and +5% prestige points earned.
tech_demonologie_desc: To know demons is to learn how to ward them off: +50% interval between border monster spawn attempts in the Underworld.
tech_resistance_a_la_corruption_desc: Your harvesters harden against the miasma: Corruption counts as 1 level lower for the harvest penalty (minimum level 1).
tech_pacte_abyssal_desc: A dark bargain struck with what whispers at the bottom of the Rift. +25% prestige points earned.
tech_secrets_de_la_faille_desc: The mysteries of the threshold unfold: Corruption counts as 1 more level lower for the harvest penalty (minimum level 1).
tech_theologie_de_l_ascension_desc: The ultimate study: what awaits beyond the Rift. +50% prestige points earned.
tech_acier_abyssal_desc: An alloy quenched in the flames of the Abyss: +25% chance to double the harvest for Forges, and the Smelter produces +1 Steel per smelt.
tech_magie_du_vide_desc: Drawing straight from the void: +25% total ritual power and -10% crystal cost of spells.
tech_coeur_de_la_terre_desc: Your miners hear the heartbeat of the world: +50% Mine harvest speed.
tech_omniscience_desc: Nothing escapes your scholars anymore: +50% research point generation speed.
tech_legion_eternelle_desc: An army that no longer knows rest: +25% unit production speed and +10 maximum soldiers per city.
tech_prospection_avancee_desc: 20% chance for each Underworld Desert hex to be a Mithril Vein instead.
tech_magic_initiation_desc: Unlocks the Growth ritual (+10% harvest speed per power).
tech_ardent_forge_ritual_desc: Unlocks the Ardent Forge ritual (+10% double harvest chance per power).
tech_clairvoyance_ritual_desc: Unlocks the Clairvoyance ritual (+15% research speed per power).
tech_martial_blessing_ritual_desc: Unlocks the Martial Blessing ritual (+3 max soldiers and +15% unit production per power).
tech_arcane_shield_ritual_desc: Unlocks the Arcane Shield ritual (+2 city defense and +15% regeneration per power).
tech_deep_light_ritual_desc: Unlocks the Light of the Depths ritual (Underworld harvests and treasure chance).
tech_invocation_desc: Unlocks the Abundance spell (instant: 10 crystals ➔ 1000 gold).
tech_troop_summoning_desc: Unlocks the Troop Summoning spell (instant: 100 crystals ➔ +100 soldiers in a targeted ally city).
tech_arcane_edification_desc: Unlocks the Arcane Edification spell (instant: 500 crystals ➔ makes a fully developed city appear on a targeted buildable vertex).
tooltip_steel_weapons_checkbox: Steel Weapons: costs 1 extra Steel, produces {0} soldiers at once
tooltip_toggle_steel_weapons: Activate / Deactivate Steel Weapons for all barracks
tooltip_toggle_arsenal: Activate / Deactivate Steel Armor for all arsenals
tooltip_toggle_weaponsmith: Activate / Deactivate production for all weapon smiths
tooltip_toggle_armorsmith: Activate / Deactivate production for all armor smiths
tooltip_toggle_alchimisthut: Activate / Deactivate Healing Potion production for all alchemist huts
tech_advanced_tactics_desc: Unlocks automatic reinforcement between allied cities
tech_patrol_desc: Unlocks automatic raiding of monsters that approach a city
tech_vendetta_desc: Unlocks automatic raids on a civilization, after a manual raid or a suffered attack
tech_surveillance_desc: Lets you actively attack a monster at distance 2 if the city has a Watchtower
tech_watchtower_construction_desc: Every new outpost automatically receives a Watchtower
tech_great_lighthouse_construction_desc: Unlocks construction of the Great Lighthouse, a monument (coastal terrain) granting prestige and range bonuses as it levels up
prestige_tooltip_unlocks_ranged_monster_: unlocks attacking monsters at distance 2 (with a Watchtower)
tooltip_wonder_surface_only: ⚠ Wonders can only be built on the surface
tooltip_wonder: Build a Wonder on a hex in your territory — must be far enough from enemy cities
tooltip_great_lighthouse_surface_only: ⚠ The Great Lighthouse can only be built on the surface
tooltip_great_lighthouse: Build the Great Lighthouse on a coastal hex in your territory
wonder_select_hex: Choose a hex adjacent to one of your cities — must be far from enemy cities
great_lighthouse_select_hex: Choose a coastal hex adjacent to one of your cities — must be far from enemy cities
event_wonder_placed_body: Your civilization has laid the first stone of a Wonder.
event_great_lighthouse_placed_body: Your civilization has laid the first stone of a Great Lighthouse.
event_great_lighthouse_levelup_body: Your Great Lighthouse has reached level {0}.
task_harvest_wood_desc: Click on a forest hex adjacent to your city to harvest wood.
task_harvest_brick_desc: Click on a hill hex adjacent to your city to harvest bricks.
task_build_seaport_desc: Gather enough resources, click on your city and build a Seaport.
task_build_sawmill_desc: Gather enough resources, click on your city and build a Sawmill.
task_build_brickworks_desc: Gather enough resources, click on your city and build a Brickworks.
task_build_first_road_desc: Click on a free edge around your city to build a road.
task_harvest_food_desc: Click on a meadow hex adjacent to a city to harvest food.
tutorial_step_harvest_desc: Select a hex adjacent to your city and tap it to harvest resources. Forest hexes give Wood, hill hexes give Bricks.
tutorial_step_production_buildings_desc: Production buildings automatically harvest resources from hexes adjacent to your city, without any input. This automatic harvesting stacks with your manual harvests.
tutorial_step_build_desc: Tap your city to open the build menu. Select an available building and construct it.
tutorial_step_road_desc: Build roads to expand your territory. To found a new city, you need to reach a vertex at least 3 roads away from your first city.
task_build_second_city_desc: Extend your roads 3 segments from your city, then click a free vertex to place an outpost and found a new city.
task_build_second_townhall_desc: Build a Town Hall in your new city to develop it.
task_upgrade_production_level2_desc: Click on a city, select a production building (Sawmill, Brickworks…) and press Upgrade.
task_build_10_cities_desc: Extend your road network and click on free vertices to found new cities.
task_build_5_libraries_desc: Gather enough resources and build a Temple in each city.
task_build_5_palisades_desc: Gather enough resources and build a Palisade in each city.
task_build_10_production_desc: Build Sawmills, Brickworks, Mills, and other production buildings in your cities.
task_build_5_cities_desc: Extend your road network and found new cities.
task_seaport_townhall_level4_desc: Click on a city, select the building and press Upgrade until level 4.
task_seaport_level4_desc: Click on a city with a Seaport, select it and upgrade it to level 4.
task_townhall_level4_desc: Click on a city with a Town Hall, select it and upgrade it to level 4.
task_build_imperial_port_desc: Select a city with a level 4 Seaport and a level 4 Town Hall, then open the Unique Buildings tab.
task_build_2_warehouses_desc: Gather enough resources and build a Warehouse in 2 different cities.
task_build_1_warehouse_desc: Gather enough resources, click on your city and build a Warehouse.
task_build_market_desc: Click on your city and build a Market to unlock trading.
task_trade_10_gold_desc: Open the Sell tab in Trade and sell resources for gold.
task_build_3_warehouses_desc: Gather enough resources and build a Warehouse in 3 different cities.
tutorial_step_trade_desc: Build a Warehouse to store your resources, then sell resources for gold. Sell 50 resources to obtain 10 gold.
task_reach_20_victory_points_desc: Upgrade Town Halls to level 3 (2 pts), build Temples (1 pt).
task_perform_prestige_desc: Once the Imperial Port is built, click the Prestige button in the main interface.
task_reach_enough_victory_points_desc: Build Temples and Libraries, and upgrade your Town Halls to earn victory points.
tutorial_step_expansion_desc: Extend your roads to a free vertex, then found an outpost to create a new city.
tutorial_step_production_desc: Build production buildings in your cities to keep your empire supplied with resources.
tutorial_step_empire_desc: Expand your empire by building many cities. Upgrade your production buildings to increase your harvests.
tutorial_step_capital_desc: Unlock the Imperial Port by owning a level 4 Seaport and a level 4 Town Hall in the same city. It is a unique building.
tutorial_step_imperial_port_desc: Build the Imperial Port to unlock Prestige and open a new era.
tutorial_step_prestige_desc: Perform a Prestige to restart with permanent bonuses and unlock new possibilities.
tutorial_step_research_desc: Buy the Research vertex in the prestige map to unlock technologies, then start your first research.
task_buy_research_vertex_desc: Open the Prestige tab, buy the Research vertex at the center of the map to unlock technologies.
task_complete_first_research_desc: Open the Research tab, select a technology and wait for it to complete.
task_build_library_level_desc: Build a Library to earn research points.
task_build_3_libraries_desc: Build Libraries in your cities to increase your research speed.
task_build_barracks_desc: Unlock the Barracks via the prestige vertex, then build one in one of your cities.
task_buy_barracks_vertex_desc: Buy the Barracks vertex in the prestige map to increase the maximum level of your Barracks.
task_complete_military_buildings_researc: Complete the Military Buildings research to increase the maximum level of your Barracks.
task_build_2_barracks_desc: Build a Barracks in two different cities to have soldiers at multiple points.
task_create_reinforcement_flow_desc: Select a city with a Barracks and set a military flow toward another allied city to send reinforcements. Maximum range: 5.
task_destroy_enemy_city_desc: Attack and destroy a city belonging to another civilization. Maximum range: 3.
task_kill_bandit_desc: Your soldiers can attack and eliminate a bandit on the map.
task_perform_second_prestige_desc: Reach the required victory points again and perform a second prestige.
task_destroy_bandit_hideout_desc: Eliminate all bandits from a hideout to destroy it and increase your prestige gains.
tutorial_step_second_prestige_desc: Perform a second prestige to strengthen your civilization. Bandits and hideouts adjacent to a city with soldiers are attacked automatically — destroying them all increases prestige gains.
tutorial_step_barracks_desc: The Barracks trains soldiers for defense and attack. Unlock it via the prestige vertex or the associated research.
tutorial_step_reinforcement_desc: Link your cities with barracks using reinforcement flows to concentrate your troops where needed. Drag and drop from a city to a close enough allied city to create a flow.
task_place_wonder_desc: Open the Wonder tab and place it on a hex adjacent to one of your cities.
task_build_wonder_desc: Invest resources into the Wonder until it reaches level 1.
task_encounter_rats_desc: Rats have invaded one of your hexes. Harvest there is blocked until your soldiers drive them out.
tutorial_step_place_wonder_desc: Place the Wonder on a hex in your territory, far from enemy cities. That hex is sacrificed: it will never produce resources again.
tutorial_step_wonder_desc: Invest heavily in the Wonder to reach level 1. It will then multiply your prestige points by a bonus that grows with time spent on the island — including time before it was built.
tutorial_step_war_desc: Attack an enemy city to destroy it. Drag and drop from one of your close enough cities to the target city to launch the assault. You cannot build next to an enemy city, and contested territories produce nothing.
monument_bonus_great_lighthouse_maritime: Active bonus: Maritime Beacons can be built
Active bonus: Maritime Beacons extend sea routes into open water
monument_bonus_great_lighthouse_tier_pic: Active bonus: choose the next island's Tier
monument_bonus_deepest_mine_next: Bonus on completion: unlocks Underworld access
deepest_mine_select_hex: Choose a Mountain adjacent to one of your cities — must be far from enemy cities
spire_select_hex: Choose a corrupted zone of the Underworld
tooltip_spire: Start building the Corruption Spire on a corrupted zone of the Underworld — once complete, multiplies your prestige points by 2 × the corruption level
tooltip_spire_underworld_only: ⚠ The Corruption Spire can only be built in the Underworld, on a corrupted zone
raid_select_city: Choose an enemy city or a monster to raid
tooltip_deepest_mine: Dig down to the Underworld — only on a Mountain inside your territory, far from enemy cities
tooltip_deepest_mine_surface_only: ⚠ The Deepest Mine can only be dug on the surface
tooltip_trade: Buy and sell resources for gold
tooltip_raid: Launch a coordinated attack against an enemy city
tooltip_raid_active: Raid in progress — click to stop it
relocation_select_city: Choose one of your cities to relocate
relocation_select_destination: Choose the new location (3 roads maximum)
tooltip_relocation: Move a city to a nearby new location — costs 100 Gold and 100 Food
walkofgod_select_hex: Choose a hex whose terrain will be transformed
tooltip_walkofgod: Randomly transforms the terrain of a visible hex
hex_tooltip_deepest_mine: ⛏ Deepest Mine — invest resources to dig
hex_tooltip_deepest_mine_dug: ⛏ Deepest Mine — the way to the Underworld is open
building_deepestmine_desc: Digs down to the Underworld and opens an underground outpost.
building_mushroomfarm_desc: Automatically harvests Food from adjacent Mushroom Caves.
building_mithrilmine_desc: Automatically extracts Mithril from adjacent Veins.
building_magetower_desc: Each cumulated level adds 10% to the maximum ritual power (10 levels to reach power 2). Also automatically harvests crystals from adjacent Crystal Caves.
building_warroom_desc: Unique building. Unlocks automation for Barracks, Military Academies and Arsenals. Provides +50% troop production speed.
building_alchimisthut_desc: Automatically harvests crystals from adjacent Fairy Circles and produces Healing Potions by consuming 1 Glass + 1 Crystal (chance to save a soldier). Must be built next to a discovered Fairy Circle.
building_volcanicforge_desc: Unique building harnessing the heat of a nearby volcano: passively generates Glass and boosts the whole civilization's Ore, Steel and Mithril production, scaling with level. Must be built next to a discovered volcano.
building_adventurersguild_desc: Unique Underworld building. Sends out an Adventurer who fights wandering monsters (never cities); another takes their place when they die.
alchimisthut_potion_costs: Cost: {0} Glass + {1} Crystal ► 1 Healing Potion per cycle
ascension_power_faith_desc: Increases the Temple's max level by 3 and reveals the existence of the Dominion.
ascension_power_handofgod_desc: Automatically harvests every available manual resource as soon as its cooldown allows it.
ascension_power_divineinventory_desc: Increases the civilization's storage capacity by 1000%.
ascension_power_eyeofgod_desc: Reveals the entire surface map, the whole technology tree and the entire prestige map.
ascension_power_walkofgod_desc: Lets you randomly transform the terrain of a visible hex (civilization action).
ascension_power_locked_tooltip: Unlock the power just below it in the column first
rituals_none_known: Research rituals in the technology tree to launch them here.
spell_select_ally_city: Choose an ally city to summon troops into
spell_cast_cost_city: Cost: {0} crystals ➔ founds a fully developed city
spell_select_buildable_vertex: Choose a buildable location to found the city
spell_blocked_no_ally_city: No allied city available to target this spell.
spell_blocked_no_buildable_vertex: No buildable location available to target this spell.
spell_blocked_crystals: Not enough crystals to cast this spell.
spell_abundance_desc: Instant spell: consumes crystals to produce gold immediately.
spell_summontroops_desc: Targeted spell: consumes crystals to summon soldiers into a chosen ally city.
spell_arcaneedification_desc: Targeted spell: makes a city appear on a buildable vertex, with a level 3 Town Hall, every available building built for free at level 2, and defense/garrison at maximum.
ritual_ardentforge_desc: +10% chance to double automatic harvests per power.
ritual_martialblessing_desc: +3 max soldiers per city and +15% unit production per power.
ritual_arcaneshield_desc: +2 city defense and +15% defense regeneration per power.
ritual_deeplight_desc: +15% Mushroom Farm and Mithril Mine harvest, +2% treasure chance per power.
building_smelter_desc: Automatically converts Ore and Wood into Steel.
smelter_production_costs: Cost: {0} Ore + 2 Wood ► {1} Steel per smelt
building_blastfurnace_desc: Unique building. All Smelters of the civilization produce +1 Steel per smelt. Requires a mountain city.
tooltip_requires_smelter_5: ⚠ Requires a level 5 Smelter in this city
building_arsenal_desc: +4 max soldiers per level. With the Steel Armor research: chance to save lost soldiers by consuming 1 Steel (10% per level).
arsenal_armor_save_chance: Steel Armor: {0}% chance to save a lost soldier (costs 1 Steel)
building_weaponsmith_desc: Automatically produces Steel Weapons by consuming Steel.
weaponsmith_production_costs: Cost: {0} Steel ► 1 Steel Weapon per cycle
building_armorsmith_desc: Automatically produces Steel Armor by consuming Steel.
armorsmith_production_costs: Cost: {0} Steel ► 1 Steel Armor per cycle
game_over_line1: All your cities have been destroyed.
corrupt_save_line1: Your save file is unreadable or incompatible.
corrupt_save_line2: Export it to send to support before continuing.
demo_end_line1: Congratulations, you've completed the 3 demo islands!
demo_end_line2: Replay island 3 and keep your prestige bonuses.
notification_cloud_load_empty: No save found in the Cloud
